message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title start EventLoop

participant "server.activeListener.OnAccept" as OnAccept
participant "server.newActiveRawConn" as newActiveRawConn
participant "server.ContinueFilterChain" as ContinueFilterChain
participant "server.activeListener.newConnection" as newConnection
participant "sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection" as OnNewConnection
participant "sever.newActiveConnection" as newActiveConnection
participant "network.connection.Start" as Start
participant "network.startRWLoop" as startRWLoop
participant "network.attachEventLoop" as attachEventLoop

OnAccept -> newActiveRawConn : 创建 filter chain
newActiveRawConn -> ContinueFilterChain : 
ContinueFilterChain -> newConnection : 创建 connection
newConnection -> OnNewConnection : 调用 activeListener 的处理新连接事件接口
OnNewConnection -> newActiveConnection : 处理新连接事件
newActiveConnection -> Start : 连接启动
Start -> startRWLoop : 处理读写时间
startRWLoop -> attachEventLoop : 保存 EventLoop

@enduml
```
